hypothesis_en: Mr President, all Members have the right to be on a committee, and this right must be strictly respected. It is up to the political groups to make proposals to guarantee this right. If things are as you say and there are Members of this Parliament who have not been assigned to any committee, I ask the leaders of the political groups, in particular, I would like to ask the President-in-Office of the Council whether he is aware of the fact that the Council has not yet taken a decision on this matter, and if so, what is the Commission's position? Because it's not a matter of order, he'll cut the microphone to the speaker.
reference_en: the (1.21) President all Members have a right to sit on a committee this ~r_ight should be strictly complied with (1.07) it's up to the political groups to make proposals to guarantee that their Members get seats on committees if the situation is as you describe and there are Members of this Parliament who are not Members of a ~committee_ then I would point out to the leaders of the political groups and in particular to the leader of the EPP group from which these Members come (2.18) that you should make a proposal for committees for these people as soon as possib= possible so that all Members of this Parliament may be Members of a committee or committees please could you please do something about that as soon as possible please could you not ladies and gentlemen put any more points that are not points of order strictly speaking if I note that your points being made are not points of order at this stage I will have to cut you off
source_es: todos los miembros tienen derecho a estar en una comisión este derecho debe ser estrictamente respetado corresponde a los Grupos políticos hacer propuestas que garanticen este derecho si las cosas son como usted dice y hay miembros de este Parlamento que no han sido adscritos a ninguna comisión pido a los responsables de los Grupos políticos y en particular al jefe del Grupo Popular al que pertenecen estos diputados y diputadas que en los plazos más breves formulen una propuesta de reasignación de puestos que permitan garantizar a todos los diputados formar parte de una comisión y lo resolveremos en los plazos más breves pero ruego por favor que no se planteen más cuestiones que no sean de orden estamos ante un tema muy importante si el Presidente p= entiende que no es una pres= no es una cuestión de orden cortará el micrófono al interviniente
